Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Continued To Dec-19-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jun-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gurinder S. Grewqal, ESQ. (415) 398-3344 for defendant and moving party Wells Fargo Bank NA
No appearance by Plaintiff

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Opposing party indicated that only fact 21 is disputed (no evidence in support cited) and did not provide any additional material facts. Nothing in Plaintiff's declaration creates a triable issue of fact regarding equity in the property: Plaintiff provides no evidence that loan modification was wrongfully denied in light of his income; or that a foreclosure alternative would yield sufficient funds to cover all the liabilities, including three Deeds of Trust and a judgment. Prevailing party is to prepare and submit a propsed order in compliance with 3.1312(b) Judge: R. Quidachay; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records is GRANTED as narrowly tailored and inclusive of April 14, 2016 ex parte order. Moving party to submit proposed order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Courtney Chu, Esq. of Yes Law Firm, (925-849-5525), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Cyrus Lafarre, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court hears the arguments on the negligence cause of action. Defendant requests that demurrer be sustained entirely.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Opposing party is ordered to provide proposed order in conformity with the tentative ruling. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Off Calendar Dec-08-2014 Continued To Feb-04-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion And Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Notice From Record
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
No appearance by plaintiff
Attorney Pamela C. Jackson, Esq. (707-446-2333), counsel for defendant/moving party

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT R W W PROPERTIES, LLC's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens is GRANTED. "No violation of [HBOR] shall affect the validity of a sale in favor of a bona fide purchaser and any of its encumbrances for value without notice". CC 2924.12(e). Plaintiff failed to show by preponderance of evidence probable validly of its claims against a bona fide purchaser or that moving defendant is not a bona fide purchaser. Defendant's objections to Plaintiff's Declaration are (1) sustained as to paragraphs 5, 9, 10, and 15; and (2) overruled as to paragraphs 6, 7, 11, 12, 13, and 14. Request for attorney's fees and costs granted in the amount of $3,310. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
